{{Quote|Lommite Limited and InterGalactic Ore have merged to become Dorvalla Mining, but the Trade Federation will transport the ore, and will now represent Dorvalla in the Galactic Senate.|[[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]]|<ref name="DMS" />}}
'''Dorvalla Mining''' was a [[Lommite/Legends|lommite]]-mining corporation that was a member of the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]]. It controlled the planet [[Dorvalla/Legends|Dorvalla]], and operated [[Dorvalla Penal]] and the [[Dorvalla Space Corps]].

Dorvalla Mining was formed out of the rival companies [[Lommite Limited]] and [[InterGalactic Ore]] after both corporations contracted the [[Toom clan]] to sabotage the opposite company's next shipment. They took and succeeded at both jobs, greatly damaging both companies, and forcing them to merge into one entity.

==Appearances==
